name: Jay Inslee
subject: Before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Did you see this? We're facing a major deadline in just a few hours. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Did you see Jay's earlier note? Washington state is making progress on the issues critical to our lives, from net neutrality to clean energy and voting rights -- we have a lot to be proud of. **But now we face a major end-of-month deadline in just a few hours.** And we need your help. Under Jay's leadership, we're showing the rest of America what can be accomplished when we put our progressive values and agenda into action. Chip in to make sure we keep modeling progress for state governments across the country before it's too late: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Sunday, April 29, 2018
Subject: Net Neutrality [Deadline]
Friend,
**D.C. politicians tried to kill net neutrality this week.** In Washington state, we stopped them in their tracks.
One of my proudest moments last month was signing the first bill in the nation protecting net neutrality.
Our state was the first in the nation to pass legislation protecting net neutrality -- and it was done with strong bipartisan support in the House and the Senate. We've built a model for the rest of the country and today we're still leading, forging a coalition of states taking the Trump administration to court to undo their disastrous and dangerous move.
It's what the times demand: strong progressive leadership that takes action. But I can't do it alone.
[**Help me show Donald Trump and Congress what can be achieved when progressive leaders work to find common ground. We must bring in $20,000 by midnight Monday.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
We took action in Washington because we saw a problem: attacks on a free and open internet.
While Congress refused to step up, we forged a legislative coalition to prevent federal government agencies like the FCC from obstructing innovation in our 21st-century economy.
Protecting net neutrality is the bold progressive action these times demand. With so many attacks on our freedoms, it's time for progressive leaders to step up.
[**As we head to November, will you help me show what progressive leadership looks like and what it can achieve?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79b35/2f5ea88d/71ec0821/2cbca3c0/3833979388/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-04-30_eom-fwd&utm_campaign=eom-fwd&utm_medium=ema")

name: Ben Jealous
subject: What I'm in it for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
Somewhere in Washington DC, the leader of the free world is recklessly tweeting decisions that are downright destructive to our nation, appointing individuals to positions of power who are detrimental to the working families they are sworn to serve, and attacking the civil rights of our friends and neighbors.
If you want to stand up to the failure, incompetence, and bigotry of the Trump Administration, send a civil rights leader to be your next governor. I've spent my life getting big things done and I'm the only candidate in this race who can mobilize our base and make sure Democrats win in November.
In 2012, under my leadership, the NAACP turned out 1.2 million unlikely voters to re-elect President Obama. And my running mate, Susie Turnbull, served as Party Chair in 2010 during the height of the Tea Party. And when Democratic turnout was down pretty much everywhere else in the country, Maryland's numbers soared and we elected Democrats up and down the ballot.
**[Today is our fundraising deadline. This is our opportunity to prove this campaign's might and ability to turnout voters in the primary. Will you donate $5 before midnight tonight to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f8/7ab0e2c4/7fbcabd2/349a50b3/853657192/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQzMDhBIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04308A")**

The way we're going to win this race is the same way we passed the DREAM Act, abolished the death penalty, passed marriage equality, expanded voting rights, and passed sensible gun safety reform 5 years ago. We will declare the motto of the _Three Musketeers_ , "all for one and one for all!" and build a bigger more robust coalition than anyone ever thought we could.
**[Make a $5 contribution right now to my campaign so we can continue to build diverse movements that will move Maryland forward.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f8/7ab0e2c4/7fbcabd2/349a50b3/853657192/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQzMDhBIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04308A")**
When we elect Democrats all across this state, we will come into the state capital with a mandate to fix the kitchen table issues that cause so much stress for all of our families.

Onward,
Ben

name: The White House
subject: The quiet patriotism of our next CIA Director
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a616b409f65a46a87eb8303e5b9af54161653973b3a0f25706a1f4d2785b0a4b3d6de8c2609f3b7cc872f8fb35120c92228d) The White House • May 1, 2018
## Driving the Day
| • | President Donald J. Trump presents the Commander-in-Chief’s Trophy to the Army college football team, which defeated Air Force and Navy this season. [Watch live at 12 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a6160de1c2a863930e43d238ae67ac34ffedfaa8bf7c5f3fae166ac8c7302bc05337214c1d69d8efc602899fc9bd22a3a817)
---|---
• | The President will meet the crew of Southwest Flight 1380, thanking them for their heroic actions following an equipment malfunction that claimed one life two weeks ago.
• | Israel released information yesterday about Iranian efforts to develop missile-deliverable nuclear weapons. [Read the statement from Press Secretary Sarah Sanders.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a616c808cc64d345f07f654c6c59fbfa36645df70ace9295adf7b77f5d87069ee314a0a3b0e79abc156e386ab6d097ce3bfc)
## The quiet patriotism of our next CIA Director
**Last week, CIA Deputy Director Gina Haspel assumed the role of Acting Director** upon Mike Pompeo’s swearing-in as America’s 70th Secretary of State. Haspel is President Trump’s choice to succeed Secretary Pompeo at the CIA’s helm on a permanent basis.
**Service in the CIA is largely quiet, behind-the-scenes work** to keep America safe. The names of these men and women are often unknown to the wider public, but their contributions to national security are indispensable. Haspel’s rise within the Agency is a testament to the crucial work of these public servants.
**Like Secretary Pompeo, Haspel’s credentials are far-reaching**. She joined the CIA in the waning days of the Cold War and years later, with the fight against al Qaeda heating up, she requested a transfer to the CIA's Counter Terrorism Center. Her first day on the job was September 11, 2001.
[That sense of patriotism is exactly what Americans deserve in a CIA Director.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a6162cbf897953a388162c08eafc9e41c67a31e57a39a5ea988da2c0346c6c1be82c0aa5e235cdd61476f544eccb07a1811d)

---
|

## Stunning new data on unaccompanied alien children
**The costs from America’s porous immigration system continue to rise**. At the end of April, [news broke](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a61601306ea5442d2eeaa0be86ab9bf16d5afb6ff66e766b526af70d593924b511ef5f2995d69dc49e57d86d8bd521aba356) that between October 2016 and December 2017, the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) was unable to locate nearly 1,500 of the 7,635 unaccompanied alien minors it attempted to reach—almost one-fifth of its file.
**“I don’t care what you think about immigration policy, it’s wrong,”** Sen. Rob Portman (R-OH) said. He’s right: A very small percentage of the unaccompanied alien children (UAC) who illegally enter the United States each year are ultimately removed, creating a major public safety challenge.
**Loopholes in our immigration laws put both UACs and American citizens at risk**. Most UACs are older teens (16-17 years old) from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador. Some are MS-13 gang members who use our immigration system to infiltrate the United States, but UACs who are not gang members are still at risk of harm from MS-13. This broken system is dangerous for everyone.
[Learn more about how President Trump is calling on Congress to fix this problem. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a61623ec3b6bbf3b6e91cb97629fabc17f69d6a1cc1e075e74c5b63c923baec5845e63d6485101b5a49bfa2e2eec7ce3398a)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump and President Buhari of the Federal Republic of Nigeria** | April 30, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a61695026bbab5fee7ffd8e43c66c0fba2ce473299e4aacdb1fc6cd107b6b0f55dd73c64d41f2900169b8fdb036fd2066fce) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8ad3cf2a0f9a616d499bd774bf2d281d2ddb366fd22c315989afb7bf6c71d72ede803539c5a52e80aaed84f5e482f7b2935432337bbb62e) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d46a067a56aaf413d355700baa0d5678ec7b236c5537de43a96b06cfa8a86e92337551484fdcfe1037cf2b002b504cb2ab6dde82a566a22983)
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Vice News: Shocking Upset on the Horizon for Steve King?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Big news from Iowa!
**Our campaign was just featured in a story by Vice News which identified five races where Democrats could score shocking upsets!**
Every day since I launched my campaign, I’ve heard or read that this race is unwinnable. It drives me nuts. I get it—history is not on our side. But there’s something in the air in Iowa’s 4th District.
Our campaign has been endorsed by local unions and a sitting member of Congress. We’ve significantly outraised Steve King two quarters in a row, and by doing so, Team Scholten has single handedly moved the needle in this race as the Cook Report changed this election from “non-risk” to a four on the risk scale.
[**_Help us keep the momentum rolling with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1138494/6333441/413246254?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVlODRjYi03ZDRkLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzg1ZTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I-NTMbUWkNUq0oI1PDUvDyHBXHNay5qnrtIBVjSr1Rg=)
Before running, I did a lot of research on what made Rep. Berkley Bedell and Sen. Tom Harkin successful. It’s that same thing that I see happening in so-called “upset” victories in Virginia, Alabama and Pennsylvania.
You get out to the people.
You show your work ethic and that you’re trustworthy.
You prove that you will fight for the people of your district.
I’m spending every day on the campaign trail doing these things and listening to the people in the district. **THIS RACE IS WINNABLE.**
[**_Be a part of the movement we’re building with a contribution of any size today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1138495/6333442/413246254?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVlODRjYi03ZDRkLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzg1ZTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I-NTMbUWkNUq0oI1PDUvDyHBXHNay5qnrtIBVjSr1Rg=)
Tell me this race is unwinnable. Tell me Steve King is unbeatable. And that only adds fuel to my fire. You won’t find a candidate that will outwork me and you won’t find a candidate that will have more fun than me. I will tell you that I’ve felt the buzz in the our district, across Iowa, and across this nation. **Change is going to happen.**
Together, we can build a 4th District, an Iowa and an America that STANDS TALL FOR ALL.
Thank you,
J.D. Scholten

| | | **Peter, do you think Congress should pass legislation to protect Special Counsel Robert Mueller?** | [**Yes**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b2/7377f838/3eec831e/51f949fa/3379960846/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/R58GRLK")

In recent months, Special Counsel Robert Mueller's investigation into Russia's interference in the 2016 election has come under increasing threat.

Mueller is a respected public servant who must be allowed to follow the facts, wherever they lead. The American people deserve to know if there was indeed interference in our election in 2016 so that we can take appropriate steps to prevent that in the future. It's essential to our democracy that we can trust our elections are free and fair.

That's why a bipartisan group of senators on the Judiciary Committee has advanced a bill that would protect the Mueller investigation. However, Mitch McConnell is refusing to bring the legislation to the Senate floor.

**We want to hear what you think. Should Congress pass legislation to protect the Mueller investigation?**
[**Yes**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20b2/7377f838/3eec831e/51f949fa/3379960846/VEsF/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/R58GRLK")

subject: One week from today
body:
Vote May 8th Republican Primary | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

It's good to be back home! This week I'm speaking with Hoosiers all across the district to share the work we're doing to advance our conservative agenda, like helping working families keep more of their hard-earned money with our recent Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.

Can you believe it--the Republican Primary Election is just a week from today, Tuesday, May 8th. **With so many important decisions facing voters, it's absolutely critical that you get out and make your voice heard!**** ** [](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=82595f41b9&e=bfe3be83a5) [CLICK HERE](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=0e80b0b91f&e=bfe3be83a5) for more information about where and how to vote.
I will always remain focused on fighting to protect our conservative Hoosier values in Washington, and I would be honored to have your vote on Tuesday, May 8th.
---
| Sincerely,

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Thank you, team! As chair of the DSCC, I want to thank you for making sure we hit our April fundraising goal!
---
[****](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180501-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you, Team --

As chair of the DSCC, I want to thank you for making sure we hit our April fundraising goal!

As we get closer to Election Day, every FEC deadline comes under more and more scrutiny -- and grassroots Democrats like you are sending a strong message.

Together, you are making it clear that we are mobilizing and ready to fight for the Senate.

It's a tough map, but because of the enthusiasm and commitment at the grassroots level, Democrats are defying the odds in special election after special election and giving Republicans the fights of their lives, even in the most unexpected races.

We have the momentum on our side -- but as we move closer to the November elections, we're going to need an even bigger surge to succeed.

And that's because Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell and their super PAC allies will stop at nothing in their attacks on our Democratic Senate candidates in order to keep control of the Senate. Our polling shows that we are facing very tight races across the map -- and with razor-thin margins, it's going to take a huge outpouring of continued support from Democrats like you to get our candidates over the finish line.

It won't be easy -- but I believe in our team and I know that when we all work together, this grassroots movement is unstoppable.

Thank you for everything you do to support our Democratic Senate candidates.

Let's keep up the fight!

Onwards,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator and DSCC Chair

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8fd/2b07114c/177dfa681/730017ae/1128321594/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8fd/2b07114c/177dfa681/730017a9/1128321594/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954c8fd/2b07114c/177dfa681/730017a8/1128321594/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
